name: enzo
description: Enzo - a self-hosted, local-first AI chat experience

scripts.dist: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo/desktop dist
scripts.dist:win: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo/desktop dist:win
scripts.dist:mac: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo/desktop dist:mac
scripts.dist:linux: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo/desktop dist:linux
